title: Pamela Rambo

'''Pamela Rambo''' is a comic book colorist who colored a number of [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse's]] [[Star Wars comic books|''Star Wars'' comic books]]. Outside of ''[[Star Wars]]'', she has colored for series such as ''[[Wikipedia:Preacher (comics)|Preacher]]'' and ''[[Wikipedia:Y: The Last Man|Y: The Last Man]]'', with the former winning an [[Wikipedia:Eisner Awards|Eisner Award]] in [[1999]].

{{Bio-stub}}
